---
title: use-errors-new
description: "Prefer errors.New for static errors."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Prefer errors.New for static errors. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
fmt.Errorf("not found")
```

## Good

```go
errors.New("not found")
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only use-errors-new`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `note`.
